name: aquameet
description: AquaMeet — diving competition management + e-judging + event infoboard (DiveRecorder/Sportity rebuild) on Cloudflare.

scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/api/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/venue-hub/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/web/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/judge/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p apps/admin/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:frontends: pnpm build:web && pnpm build:judge && pnpm build:admin
